title: Agents, Workflows, and the Control Loop · Goal Brief: Tool Boundary
summary: Compare a fixed workflow with an adaptive tool-using agent. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops tool boundary increment in an agent-system boundary map. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define which effects occur in the model, host, tools, and external services.
Separate model context, application state, external state, and durable records.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Predict Tool Boundary
steps.instruction:

content.text: Define which effects occur in the model, host, tools, and external services. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.
